ddls:
CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax return */,
  "filing_type" TEXT /* Type of filing (EFILE, PAPER, etc.) */,
  "ein" TEXT /* Employer Identification Number of the taxpayer */,
  "tax_period" TEXT /* Tax period for which the return is filed */,
  "sub_date" TEXT /* Submission date and time of the return */,
  "taxpayer_name" TEXT /* Name of the non-profit organization filing the return */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Type of return submitted (e.g., 990, 990EZ) */,
  "dln" TEXT /* Document Locator Number associated with the return */,
  "object_id" TEXT /* Object ID for tracking purposes */,
  "tax_year" INTEGER /* Tax year for which the return is filed */,
  "total_gross_income" TEXT /* Total gross income of the non-profit organization */,
  "total_expenses" TEXT /* Total expenses of the non-profit organization */,
  "net_assets" TEXT /* Net assets of the non-profit organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_return_type FOREIGN KEY ("return_type") REFERENCES return_types ("return_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_ein FOREIGN KEY ("ein") REFERENCES taxpayers ("ein"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_filing_type FOREIGN KEY ("filing_type") REFERENCES filing_types ("filing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxpayers" (
  "ein" TEXT /* Employer Identification Number */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the organization */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the organization is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the organization is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries regarding the tax return */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the organization */,
  "type_of_organization" TEXT /* Type of non-profit organization (e.g., charity, foundation, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ein")
)

CREATE TABLE "return_types" (
  "return_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of return */,
  "return_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the return type (e.g., 990, 990EZ) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the return type */,
  "form_name" TEXT /* Name of the form associated with the return type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_types" (
  "filing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing type */,
  "filing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the filing type (e.g., EFILE, PAPER) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filing method */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the filing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax return associated with the status change */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tax return (e.g., Submitted, Under Review, Approved) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was changed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the status change */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the status change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the status change was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_status_logs_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_id") REFERENCES returns ("return_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax return associated with the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Whether the notification has been read by the recipient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_id") REFERENCES returns ("return_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "return_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tax return being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was conducted */,
  "audit_result" TEXT /* Outcome of the audit (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "auditor_name" TEXT /* Name of the auditor who conducted the audit */,
  "audit_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the audit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_return_id FOREIGN KEY ("return_id") REFERENCES returns ("return_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., taxpayer, IRS user, auditor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
